overall.description: Gameplay footage from Monster Hunter Wilds showing a hunter and Palico companion traversing a desert canyon, encountering a large shelled monster, engaging in brief combat to defeat it, then continuing through open desert terrain. The environment features sandy ground, towering rock formations, and hazy overcast lighting typical of a desert wasteland biome.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with towering rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sandy canyon with weapon sheathed on back, accompanied by a small Palico companion

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation forming the left boundary of the canyon passage
tall layered rock formation forming the right boundary of the canyon passage
sandy desert floor with visible footprints and ripples
distinctive tall thin rock spire visible in the distance ahead
small rock outcrops scattered along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The hunter walks through a narrow desert canyon with high rock walls on both sides. The sandy ground stretches ahead toward a tall rock spire visible in the hazy distance. The Palico companion follows closely behind as they navigate the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening canyon transition to open desert basin

events.description: large winged mount creature enters frame from the left side
large shelled monster emerges from behind rocks ahead

agents.ego_description: moving toward the large monster while observing the winged mount passing by on the left

notable_agents.action: winged mount with rider walking past the player on the left side
large armored monster with shell emerging from the sand near rock formations

entered.detail: wide open desert area becoming visible as the canyon opens up
massive boulder formation near where the monster emerges

segments.scene_description: The canyon widens into an open basin where a winged mount passes by on the left. Ahead, a large shelled monster emerges from behind rocks. The hunter continues forward, transitioning from the enclosed canyon to the open desert arena.

events.description: hunter draws weapon and strikes the shelled monster
monster defeated and collapses onto the sand
hunter approaches carcass and gathers loot materials

agents.ego_description: engaging the armored monster with melee attacks, defeating it, and collecting dropped materials

notable_agents.action: large shelled monster defending then being defeated by the hunter

entered.detail: defeated monster body lying on the sand with loot particles visible

segments.scene_description: The hunter engages the shelled monster in combat, quickly defeating it with a heavy weapon strike. The monster collapses onto the sand, and the hunter gathers materials from the carcass while the Palico watches nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plains with scattered rock outcrops

agents.ego_description: continuing journey through open desert terrain after combat, moving toward distant landmarks

entered.detail: small rock formations scattered across the open sand
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon
sparse dry bushes and desert plants

segments.scene_description: After looting the defeated monster, the hunter proceeds through the open desert plains. The terrain features scattered rocks and sparse vegetation, with distant mountains visible through the hazy atmosphere. The Palico continues following as they explore the vast wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a narrow desert canyon into a vast, open wasteland. It begins with the hunter and Palico navigating a sandy passage enclosed by high rock walls, moving steadily toward a distant spire under a hazy sky. As the canyon widens into an open basin, a winged mount glides past and the terrain expands into an arena where a large shelled monster emerges from behind the rocks. The scene then shifts into a brief combat encounter that ends with the monster collapsing onto the sand, allowing the hunter to gather materials from the carcass. Finally, the camera follows the pair as they leave the site of the battle and venture across wide desert plains scattered with sparse vegetation and distant mountains.
